spec.name: Sir Aldric Valorheart

aiChat.persona: Sir Aldric Valorheart, The Iron Bastion
lines: A sworn knight of the Crusade who has never broken a shield wall.

spec.title: The Iron Bastion
spec.lore: A sworn knight of the Crusade who has never broken a shield wall. Where Aldric plants his banner, the line holds.

spec.name: Gareth Moonshadow

lines: Cursed at birth to walk between man and beast, Gareth hunts the Crusade's enemies under the half-moon and is gone by dawn.

spec.title: The Twilight Stalker
spec.lore: Cursed at birth to walk between man and beast, Gareth hunts the Crusade's enemies under the half-moon and is gone by dawn.

spec.name: Archmage Elara Brightspire

aiChat.persona: Archmage Elara Brightspire, The Storm Caller
lines: First of the Brightspire conclave.

spec.title: The Storm Caller
spec.lore: First of the Brightspire conclave. She bottles tempests and looses them upon the field, healing her faithful in the same breath.

spec.name: Kael Shadowblade

lines: A ranger-scout who speaks once and shoots twice.

spec.title: The Silent Arrow
spec.lore: A ranger-scout who speaks once and shoots twice. His arrows find the gap in any armor before the warhorn even sounds.

spec.name: Ulfgar Bonecrusher

lines: They say Ulfgar once felled a siege tower with three swings.

spec.title: The Mountain Breaker
spec.lore: They say Ulfgar once felled a siege tower with three swings. His warhammer is named Grief, and it has earned the name.

spec.name: Hrothgar Fangborn

aiChat.persona: Hrothgar Fangborn, The Beast of the Wilds
lines: Raised by the wolves that should have eaten him.

spec.title: The Beast of the Wilds
spec.lore: Raised by the wolves that should have eaten him. Hrothgar fights with tooth and axe alike, and answers to no chieftain.

spec.name: Volka Stormborn

lines: Born in a blizzard that buried her clan, Volka carries the cold inside her.

spec.title: The Frost Witch
spec.lore: Born in a blizzard that buried her clan, Volka carries the cold inside her. Foes freeze where they stand and shatter where they fall.

spec.name: Syala Windrider

lines: Fastest bow north of the spine ridge.

spec.title: The Silent Huntress
spec.lore: Fastest bow north of the spine ridge. Syala runs down cavalry on foot and is already nocking the next arrow when the first lands.

spec.name: Thane Ironshield

lines: Last thane of a sealed hold.

spec.title: The Mountain Guardian
spec.lore: Last thane of a sealed hold. Ironshield guards the deep roads with a hammer in one hand and a grudge in the other.

spec.name: Bromm Earthshaker

lines: A dwarf who took the primal pact and never quite changed back.

spec.title: The Stone Beast
spec.lore: A dwarf who took the primal pact and never quite changed back. The mountain answers when Bromm roars.

spec.name: Runa Forgekeeper

lines: Keeper of the ancestral forge-fire.

spec.title: The Flame Smith
spec.lore: Keeper of the ancestral forge-fire. Runa shapes living flame the way her kin shape steel — patiently, then all at once.

spec.name: Durin Tunnelwatcher

lines: Sentinel of the under-dark crossings.

spec.title: The Deep Shot
spec.lore: Sentinel of the under-dark crossings. Durin can put a bolt through a cave-spider's eye in pitch black by sound alone.

spec.name: Thalion Bladedancer

lines: A duelist of the high courts who turned war into choreography.

spec.title: The Graceful Death
spec.lore: A duelist of the high courts who turned war into choreography. Every parry of Thalion's ends a life — usually two.

spec.name: Sylara Wildheart

lines: Bonded to the wood itself.

spec.title: The Forest Spirit
spec.lore: Bonded to the wood itself. Sylara wears the shape of stag, wolf, and thorn, and the forest fights beside her.

spec.name: Lyra Stormweaver

lines: She learned magic by listening to thunder.

spec.title: The Tempest
spec.lore: She learned magic by listening to thunder. Lyra weaves lightning through ranks of armor like thread through cloth.

spec.name: Aelindra Swiftbow

lines: The wind carries her arrows and hides her steps.

spec.title: The Wind Archer
spec.lore: The wind carries her arrows and hides her steps. Aelindra has emptied a quiver before her targets knew the battle had begun.

spec.name: Grommash Ironjaw

lines: Warchief by right of every skull on his belt.

spec.title: The Warlord
spec.lore: Warchief by right of every skull on his belt. Grommash leads the Legion's vanguard and expects to die last.

spec.name: Fenris Bloodfang

lines: The largest worg the Legion has ever fielded.

spec.title: The Alpha
spec.lore: The largest worg the Legion has ever fielded. Fenris does not command the pack — he is the pack.

spec.name: Zuejin the Hexmaster

aiChat.persona: Zuejin the Hexmaster, The Blood Shaman
lines: He spends his own blood for power and his enemies' for sport.

spec.title: The Blood Shaman
spec.lore: He spends his own blood for power and his enemies' for sport. Zuejin's hexes rot armor and resolve alike.

spec.name: Razak Deadeye

lines: Razak counts kills in trophies, not numbers.

spec.title: The Trophy Hunter
spec.lore: Razak counts kills in trophies, not numbers. He picks the proudest target on the field and takes their head first.

spec.name: Lord Malachar

lines: Slain at his own coronation and risen the same night.

spec.title: The Deathless Knight
spec.lore: Slain at his own coronation and risen the same night. Malachar has fought every war since and intends to fight every war to come.

spec.name: The Ghoulfather

lines: A stitched horror of a dozen beasts and twice as many men.

spec.title: The Abomination
spec.lore: A stitched horror of a dozen beasts and twice as many men. What the Ghoulfather cannot kill, it adds to itself.

spec.name: Necromancer Vexis

lines: Every soul Vexis reaps becomes a soldier.

spec.title: The Soul Harvester
spec.lore: Every soul Vexis reaps becomes a soldier. She has lost battles and won the war that followed with the dead of both sides.

spec.name: Shade Whisper

lines: Half-here and half-gone.

spec.title: The Phantom Archer
spec.lore: Half-here and half-gone. Shade's arrows pass through shields as if they were mist, because so does Shade.
